seoTitle: Marys Mount vs Maryville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Marys Mount vs Maryville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marys Mount and Maryville.
heading: Marys Mount vs Maryville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marys Mount, New South Wales and Maryville, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maryville has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Marys Mount (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marys Mount or Maryville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marys Mount has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Maryville scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marys Mount scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Maryville scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marys Mount or Maryville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maryville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
